rate_items.change: Codex app 26.609 added rate-limit reset banking for Plus users, including an initial free reset and referral invitations during the launch promotion.
Codex app 26.609 added rate-limit reset banking for Pro users, including an initial free reset and referral invitations during the launch promotion.
Codex app 26.609 added a separate Business referral path where eligible members can invite coworkers to earn shared workspace credits.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official Codex changelog reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Review Codex Plus, Pro, and Business usage policies before relying on reset banking or referral-earned credits in automation planning.
Re-check Codex Computer Use enablement, regional eligibility, and per-app access controls before changing browser or desktop automation runbooks.
Retest browser-debugging workflows that depend on console, network, runtime-error, or page-state inspection because Developer mode adds deeper browser access paths.

limitations: APW records official changelog facts only; exact tenant eligibility, referral promotion availability, reset quantities, regional Computer Use availability, and app rollout timing may vary.
No raw changelog body is copied into the event.
summary: OpenAI's Codex app 26.609 changelog records rate-limit reset banking for Plus and Pro users, shared Business workspace credit referrals, Developer mode browser debugging, and expanded Computer Use controls and availability.
title: OpenAI Codex App Added Rate-Limit Reset Banking And Computer Use Controls
